mapper.select: select k.*, u.name, u.sysname from kanban_task k left join users u on u.id = k.users_c_id where k.project_seq = #{project_seq} order by k.status, k.position
select p.users_id, u.name, u.sysname from project_members p left join users u on u.id = p.users_id where p.project_seq = #{project_seq}
